generated_oml:
import DTDFVocab
instance DigitalShadow : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Single digital shadow instance for the first axis of the MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
]
instance FirstAxis : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "The first axis of the MABI MAX 100 industrial robot, comprising permanent magnet synchronous motor, gearwheel, and cycloidal gearbox"
]
instance Gearwheel : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Gearwheel component in the first axis of the MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
]
instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox component in the first axis of the MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
]
instance SiemensSINUMERIK840Dsl : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for commanding position, speed, or acceleration inputs"
]
instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor converting electrical current to torque output"
]
instance MotorPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]
instance GearboxPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxPositionEncoder
]
instance CurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor position encoder mounted directly on the motor",
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
]
instance GearboxPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder behind the gearbox",
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxPositionDataTransmitted
]
instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring motor current (I_M)",
    DTDFVocab:producedData CurrentDataTransmitted
]
instance DataVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Integrated data representation for monitoring and analysis"
]
instance JointFrictionParameterIdentification : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identification of joint friction parameters for improving robot motion accuracy"
]
instance ControlSystemAdjustment : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjusting control system parameters based on friction model insights to improve robot motion accuracy",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]
instance VisualizationDashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visualization dashboard for integrated data representation",
    DTDFVocab:provides DataVisualizationInsight
]
instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of joint friction using white-box and black-box models",
    DTDFVocab:provides JointFrictionParameterIdentification
]
instance MotionAccuracyEnhancementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enhancement of robot motion accuracy through model-based control adjustments",
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlSystemAdjustment
]
instance MATLAB_Simulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink for simulation modeling",
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]
instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for system architecture description",
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, MotionAccuracyEnhancementService
]
instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells for digital twin management",
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, MotionAccuracyEnhancementService, VisualizationDashboardService
]
instance MQTTEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT for data streaming",
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, MotionAccuracyEnhancementService, VisualizationDashboardService
]
instance DashboardVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization tools for integrated data representation",
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationDashboardService
]
instance MotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular position data from motor encoder",
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLAB_Simulink, SysMLEnabler
]
instance GearboxPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular position data from gearbox encoder",
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxPositionDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLAB_Simulink, SysMLEnabler
]
instance CurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured current (I_M) from sensors",
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLAB_Simulink, SysMLEnabler
]
instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity data derived from position sensors",
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLAB_Simulink, SysMLEnabler
]
instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Torque data derived from current and motor parameters",
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLAB_Simulink, SysMLEnabler
]
instance SysML_BlockDefinitionDiagram : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for structural modeling of the first axis",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]
instance SysML_InternalBlockDiagram : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for structural modeling of the first axis",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]
instance SimulinkCoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model for Coulomb-Viscous friction",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLAB_Simulink
]
instance SimulinkStribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model for Stribeck friction",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLAB_Simulink
]
instance SimulinkDahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model for Dahl friction",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLAB_Simulink
]
instance SimulinkLuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model for LuGre friction",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLAB_Simulink
]
instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for digital twin management",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AASEnabler
]
instance DigitalShadowSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains FirstAxis, SiemensSINUMERIK840Dsl, PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, Gearwheel, CycloidalGearbox, MotorEncoder, GearboxPositionEncoder, CurrentSensor, DigitalShadow
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data processing and synchronization for continuous friction model identification during robot operation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated system integrating physical robot axis, sensor data via MQTT, Simulink-based processing components, SysML engineering models, and dashboard visualization for unified data representation."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated, utilizing live operational data from the physical robot during real-time monitoring and analysis."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation through deviation analysis between simulated and measured data; friction models validated using mathematical equations from [45] (Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, LuGre)."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time data transmission between physical sensors and digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Adherence to Asset Administration Shell (AAS) standards and SysML modeling conventions."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety cell restricts working range to [-90°, 90°], but no DT-specific security or safety measures detailed in the document."
]
